title: Libungan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Libungan with a Z-Score of +3.14. The score of 10.0/10 indicates a critical level event.
body:
The current heat wave in Libungan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a score of 10.0/10 and a Z-Score of +3.14, indicating a significant anomaly.
The heat index is further exacerbated by an humidity of 83% and a wind speed of 14.3 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable.
The CDD of 10.0 GG and the absence of any HDD indicate a high energy demand for cooling, with no relief from colder temperatures.
